title: Iran mediators make last-ditch push for 45-day ceasefire
summary:
The U.S., Iran and a group of regional mediators are discussing the terms for a potential 45-day ceasefire that could lead to a permanent end to the war, according to four U.S., Israeli and regional sources with knowledge of the talks.

title: How The Nvidia (NVDA) Narrative Is Shifting With US$1t AI Orders And Valuation Debates
summary: Nvidia’s fair value estimate has been adjusted slightly from US$269.23 to US$268.22, signaling only a very small change in the underlying model. That fine tuning sits alongside research focused on AI demand, the US$1t order visibility through 2027, and differing views on how much of that story is already reflected in the share price.
